mapper.select: SELECT rv.rev_id , rv.res_id , rv.com_id , rv.emp_id , rv.quantity , rv.status , rv.req_date , rv.remark , rv.updated_at , r.res_name , r.res_code , e.emp_name , d.dept_name FROM reservation rv JOIN resource r ON rv.res_id = r.res_id JOIN employee e ON rv.emp_id = e.emp_id JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE rv.rev_id = #{revId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (res_id, com_id, emp_id, quantity, status, req_date, remark, updated_at) VALUES (#{resId}, #{comId}, #{empId}, #{quantity}, 'WAI', NOW(), #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET res_id = #{resId}, quantity = #{quantity}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE rev_id = #{revId} AND status = 'WAI'
UPDATE reservation SET status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE rev_id = #{revId}
mapper.select: select (select COUNT(*) from reservation where com_id = #{comId}) as resvTotal, (select COUNT(*) from reservation where com_id = #{comId} and status='WAI') as waiTotal, (select COUNT(*) from reservation where com_id = #{comId} and status='APP') as appTotal, (select COUNT(*) from reservation where com_id = #{comId} and status='REJ') as rejTotal
